home.institucionalDesc1: For over 15 years we've been building secure and reliable IT infrastructure for companies of all sizes. Our mission is to ensure operational stability, data protection, and business continuity.
home.institucionalDesc2: We are a reference in the Paraíba Valley region for Dell PowerEdge servers, Microsoft 365, pfSense firewalls, and specialized technical support.
home.servicosDesc: Equipment leasing, dedicated support, security, and complete infrastructure — with a fixed monthly price and no surprises.
home.segmentosDesc: Notary office, clinic, law firm, or factory — each industry has different demands. We've solved them all.
home.infraDesc1: Dell PowerEdge servers, corporate networks, pfSense firewalls, and backup solutions. We design and deploy environments that guarantee high availability and performance.
home.infraDesc2: Infrastructure sized to fit each company's reality, with 24/7 monitoring and specialized technical support.
home.blogDesc: Practical guides for decision-makers who want to make smart choices about infrastructure, security, and productivity.
home.authorityDesc: When IT works, your team produces more, your clients are served without failures, and you sleep well at night. That's what we've delivered for over 15 years.
home.problemsDesc: Every hour of downtime is expensive. Every lost file is unrecoverable. If this sounds like you, it's time to act.
problems: Slow computers holding back the team
Fear of cyberattacks or data loss

differentials: 24/7 monitoring — we fix it before it breaks
Fast support when you need it most
IT that scales with your company

faqItems.q: How much does it cost to fix my IT once and for all?
faqItems.a: It depends on the size of your operation. We provide a free assessment and deliver a proposal with a fixed monthly rate — no surprises. Companies with 5+ computers start at $25/mo per machine.
Yes. Most of our clients have between 5 and 50 computers. We build solutions proportional to your size, without overkill and without underestimating risks.

faqItems.q: What if the server goes down after business hours?
faqItems.a: Our monitoring is 24/7. If something happens, the team is automatically notified before you even notice. And with SLA plans, emergency support is guaranteed.

faqItems.q: Can I lease computers instead of buying?
faqItems.a: Yes. Dell desktop leasing starts at $50/mo per unit, with support included, guaranteed replacement, and no upfront investment. Ideal for financial predictability.

home.ctaDesc: Request a free assessment and get a clear proposal with a fixed price and no surprises. In 48 hours you'll know exactly what you need.

items.name: Maria Angela
items.text: Since WMTi took over our IT, we haven't had a single outage. Our office runs all day without freezing. Worth every penny.

items.name: Fernanda Oliveira
items.text: We replaced all our computers with leased ones and saved over $8,000 in investment. If a PC has a problem, they swap it the same day.

items.name: Ricardo Santos
items.text: They connected our 3 offices with total security. Before, we lived in fear of attacks — today I sleep well knowing everything is monitored.

problems.mobileSummaryDesc: Overheating, slow drives, viruses, unstable network — we diagnose and fix the most common performance issues. Request a free assessment.

items.title: Overheating
items.desc: Dried thermal paste and dust-clogged fans cause freezing, shutdowns, and reduce processor lifespan.
items.solution: Preventive internal cleaning + professional thermal paste replacement.

items.title: Slow or Failing Drive
items.desc: Mechanical hard drives degrade over time, causing extreme slowness during boot and program loading.
items.solution: Upgrade to NVMe SSD — up to 10x faster.

items.title: Viruses & Malware
items.desc: Systems without corporate antivirus are vulnerable to ransomware, data theft, and slowdowns from hidden processes.

items.title: Unstable Network
items.desc: Deteriorated cables, consumer-grade switches, and misconfigured routers cause constant drops and lost productivity.
items.solution: Structured network design with managed switches.

items.title: Corrupted Operating System
items.desc: Ignored updates and pirated software degrade Windows, causing blue screens and constant errors.
items.solution: Clean reinstallation with original Microsoft licensing.

items.title: No Backup
items.desc: Critical data stored only on local computers — a burned drive means total and irreversible data loss.
items.solution: Automated local + cloud backup with daily verification.

items.title: Undersized Hardware
items.desc: Insufficient RAM and outdated processors can't handle modern software, causing freezes and crashes.
items.solution: Technical assessment + custom upgrade for your operations.

items.title: No Preventive Maintenance
items.desc: Equipment without regular check-ups accumulates silent issues until a critical failure shuts down operations.
items.solution: Monthly preventive maintenance contract with reports.

problems.ctaTitle: Don't wait for the problem to shut down your business
problems.ctaDesc: Request a free infrastructure assessment. Our technical team identifies bottlenecks, risks, and improvement opportunities — no commitment.

pathSelector.desc: Choose the option that best matches your needs. We'll build a personalized quote.
pathSelector.emergencialDesc:
Urgent problem at your company? Our team can provide immediate technical assistance to restore servers, networks, systems, or computers that have stopped working.

Pay per hour and use when you need. Take advantage of our hourly promotion.
pathSelector.avulsoDesc:
Request one-time technical assistance without a monthly contract. Ideal for installations, configurations, maintenance, network improvements, or infrastructure.

Pay per hour and use when you need. Take advantage of our hourly promotion.
pathSelector.locacaoDesc: Brand new Dell OptiPlex computers with maintenance, backup, and technical support throughout the contract. No upfront investment.
pathSelector.suporteTitle: Hire monthly support for my current network
pathSelector.suporteDesc: Keep your current computers and count on our IT team to manage infrastructure, servers, and security.
pathSelector.ajudaTitle: I'm not sure yet, I want to understand which option is best
pathSelector.ajudaDesc: Answer a few quick questions about your company and we'll recommend the best option for your case.

restructuring.seoDescription: Premium package with no hour limit. Servers, Active Directory, backup, antivirus, standardization, and full corporate network reconfiguration.
restructuring.heroDescription: Slow network. Viruses every week. Files disappearing. Computers freezing. A server nobody configured properly. If your company IT runs like this, the problem is not one device — it's the whole structure. This service fixes everything at once, with no hour limit and no pricing surprises.
